# Empowering Innovations
With Blockchain & Web3 technologies
[Contact us](https://k2lis.com/#contact)
## k2lis
About the company
Our goal is to support our customers, from any sector, to anticipate, innovate and succeed in their transition towards Web3 & Blockchain technologies.
It is as partners that we put our global technological expertise to use in addressing the challenges of these technologies.
## Our Solutions
Designed to meet the business challenges of our clients
[ Authencia Digitize and protect your certificates and diplomas with Blockchain technology](https://authencia.k2lis.com/)
## Our Services
From our proficient experts, to you
![](https://k2lis.com/media/Formation.svg) Training Understanding the challenges of Blockchain technologies and their underlying workings![](https://k2lis.com/media/Compliance.svg) Strategy & Consulting Identify business use cases, analyze the market, and prepare for the Web3 transformation.![](https://k2lis.com/media/ICO.svg) Experimentation & Building Experiment, design and develop projects
[Request a Consulting](https://k2lis.com/#contact)
